sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, number Float64, created_at DateTime, remarks String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 5.5, now(), 'first entry'), (2, 10.0, now(), 'second entry'), (3, NULL, now(), 'no number'), (4, 25.2, now(), 'twenty five'), (5, 100.6, now(), 'hundred point six');
SELECT quantileGK(50, 0.5)(number) AS median_value FROM test_data WHERE number <> 10.0;
SELECT id, quantileGK(10, 0.25)(number) AS qk_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING qk_value <> 5.5;

SELECT a.id, quantileGK(100, 0.75)(a.number + b.number) AS combined_quantile FROM test_data AS a JOIN (SELECT number FROM test_data WHERE remarks <> 'no number') AS b ON (a.id <> b.number) GROUP BY a.id;
SELECT quantileGK(1000, 0.5)(number + IFNULL(created_at, toDateTime('1970-01-01'))) AS adjusted_median FROM test_data WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL AND remarks <> '';

SELECT quantileGK(1, 0.1)(number) AS low_accuracy, quantileGK(100, 0.9)(number) AS high_accuracy FROM (SELECT number FROM test_data WHERE created_at < now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS filtered_data WHERE low_accuracy <> high_accuracy;
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, quantileGK(100, 0.5)(number) AS quantile_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING quantile_value <> 10.0;
SELECT t.id, t.quantile_value FROM temp_test AS t WHERE t.quantile_value <> (SELECT quantileGK(50, 0.5)(number) FROM test_data WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (6, 0.0, now(), 'zero entry'), (7, 1000.0, now(), 'thousand entry');
SELECT quantileGK(10, 0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_data WHERE number IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_numeric WHERE number <> 1000.0;
